creator: dbn@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Yuri

Thank you for submitting the patch.  

I see the the official source for downloading VMD [1] still requires a username/password and accepting the license.  On what basis did you determine that the source tarballs are open access?  

Specifically, just because a file can be downloaded without a username/password does not automatically mean the files are open access (e.g. that "open" access may be a mistake on the hosting side and against the terms of use).  

If there is a link to the download location that isn't behind a username/password "wall" then I would consider it open access.

Regards

David

[1] https://www.ks.uiuc.edu/Development/Download/download.cgi?PackageName=VMD
